## AbstractModelClass.insertOne() method

Inserts a single document into the database.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static insertOne(doc: any, options?: ModelSaveOptions): Promise<any>;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

doc


</td><td>

any


</td><td>

The document to be inserted into the database.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

options


</td><td>

[ModelSaveOptions](./iodm.modelsaveoptions.md)


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Optional settings for the insertOne operation.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Promise&lt;any&gt;

A promise that resolves with the inserted document, including any default values and generated keys.

## Remarks

Nested schema values will be saved to it's corresponding object stores.

## Example


```ts
const user = await UserModel.insertOne({ name: 'John', age: 30 });
console.log(user);
```
